case_title: PATEL, G. B. vs. VASQUEZ, VICTOR et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, G. B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, VICTOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1507 CALIFORNIA ST, RM #216, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, VICTOR
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, VICTOR
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, G. B. AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, VICTOR DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, G. B.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, G. B. AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, VICTOR
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, G. B. SERVED JAN-31-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, VICTOR
